# DreamFactory Documentation
> https://wiki.dreamfactory.com

DreamFactory is an open-source REST API platform that automatically generates secure, scalable APIs for hundreds of data sources including databases, file systems, and third-party services. Built with PHP/Laravel, it supports on-premise and cloud deployment with Docker, Kubernetes, and traditional server installations.

Key capabilities: automatic REST API generation from any database, role-based access control (RBAC), API key and JWT authentication, OAuth 2.0/SAML/LDAP/Active Directory SSO, rate limiting, event scripting, caching, and Model Context Protocol (MCP) for AI integration.

This wiki is the single source of truth for all DreamFactory documentation.

## Metadata

- Version: 7.x
- Maintainer: DreamFactory Software, Inc.
- Repository: https://github.com/dreamfactorysoftware/dreamfactory
- Website: https://dreamfactory.com
- Documentation: https://wiki.dreamfactory.com
- Community: https://community.dreamfactory.com
- License: Open Source (Apache 2.0); Commercial licenses available (Gold, Silver)

## Quick Reference

### Base API URL Format
All endpoints: https://{instance}/api/v2/{service_name}

### Authentication Headers
- X-DreamFactory-API-Key: {your-api-key}
- X-DreamFactory-Session-Token: {your-session-token}

### Common Query Parameters
- filter: SQL-like filtering (e.g., filter=status='active')
- limit: Maximum records to return (default varies by service)
- offset: Records to skip for pagination
- order: Sort order (e.g., order=name ASC)
- fields: Comma-separated field names to return
- related: Related tables to include
- include_count: Include total record count in response

### Filter Operators
=, !=, >, >=, <, <=, like, in, is null, is not null
Combine with: and, or, parentheses for grouping

### Supported Database Connectors
Open Source: PostgreSQL, MySQL/MariaDB, SQLite, SQL Server, AlloyDB
Commercial: Oracle, IBM DB2, Informix, SAP SQL Anywhere, Firebird, MongoDB, Cassandra, CouchDB, DynamoDB, Redshift

### RBAC Verb Masks
GET=1, POST=2, PUT=4, PATCH=8, DELETE=16 (combine: full access = 31)

### MCP Integration
DreamFactory supports Model Context Protocol (MCP) for AI assistant integration.
Create MCP services via the admin panel to expose database APIs to AI tools.
